推荐场景: 酒店式公寓｜连续找房间、家具和物品
60秒任务: 「家居 Boss」：房间/家具/家务指令；A=礼貌短句/正确动作；B=表达生硬/动作错翻车。
目标功能: 房间识别｜there is/are｜家中位置｜家务动作｜居住描述
场景族: 公寓｜厨房｜客厅｜卧室｜朋友家｜酒店房间
推荐掌握的高价值、高频、可复用句型、短语、习语、固定搭配 池:
Where is the bathroom?（问房间）
There is a bed in the room.（说明有无）
Is there a table?（确认有无）
The key is on the desk.（位置）
I can't find my phone.（找物）
Please clean the kitchen.（家务）
Turn off the light.（指令）
Can you help me?（求助）
Let me check.（检查）
Here it is.（找到了）
That works.（确认可行）
Thank you.（感谢）
推荐掌握的核心词汇、词组池:
Nouns: kitchen, bedroom, bathroom, living room, apartment, hotel room, bed, table, chair, sofa, desk, key, phone, light, door, window
Verbs: find, clean, check, help, open, close, turn off, put
Prepositions: on, under, in, near, by
Adjectives: small, big, clean, quiet
Chunks: there is, there are, in the room, on the table, turn off the light, at home
